name: Chicken Soup with Potato Dumplings (Gfdm86a)
recipeIngredient: 1 Tbsp Green onion; chopped with top
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first 8 ingredients (onion to sage) in a Dutch oven.
2. Cook onion and garlic in oil until golden brown, stirring frequently.
3. Add broth, chicken, celery, carrots, and sage. Bring to a boil.
4. Prepare the potato dumplings: mix Bisquick, mashed potatoes, green onion, pepper, and milk until a soft dough forms.
5. Beat vigorously for 30 seconds, then knead about 2 minutes or until smooth, adding more baking mix if necessary.
6. Roll the dough into 18 balls, each about 1 1/2 inches in diameter.
7. Drop the dumplings into the boiling soup.
8. Cook uncovered over low heat for 10 minutes.
9. Cover and cook an additional 10 minutes.
Each serving contains 305 calories.
